entities.name: TISSUE CULTURE
entities.description: Technology used for the regeneration of plants from cells, tissues, and organs to facilitate crop improvement

entities.name: PLANT REGENERATION
entities.description: The process of regenerating whole plants from cultured cells, tissues, or organs

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing the genetic makeup of crops to improve productivity or quality

entities.name: OILSEED CROPS
entities.description: Crops grown primarily for the extraction of oil from their seeds

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An oilseed crop (Arachis hypogaea) targeted for yield improvement via tissue culture

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The measure of agricultural productivity, specifically the amount of crop produced per unit area
